## Recent upstream changes
- 8dba6bb chore: adopt the REUSE specification for licensing (#103)
- 0b76c54 feat: allow hiding the UID and String ID columns (#102)
- d0cacef feat: freeze arbitrary columns and add per-column hide/freeze menu (#101)
- 2ed8d8f refactor: split DynamicTable imports between core and YARD-specific ones
- 6097eb2 refactor: rearrange DataTable initialization code
- a2f72e5 refactor: move `cell_style.gd` to parent directory
- 6bb7441 refactor: route all type-specific cell inputs (click, drag, Enter) through CellType.handle_input
- 570d09a refactor: do not save enum cell PopupMenu selection using Object.metadata (cause that's nasty)
- b30e506 refactor: clean up cell-type-specific logic from the ColumnConfig class
- 3ea16db refactor: rename DynamicTable to DataTable
- 310908c refactor: move DynamicTable and EditorIcon{Control} scripts under `editor_only/classes/`
- 19d11c1 fix: make the color picker editor look like it was before the refactor
